title: SpoopyCraft
description: This mod pack takes both spooky with good mods and fun.
body: This mod pack takes both spooky with good mods and fun. The mod has a great moody shader which is a must have. The mod has new animals with barley any changes to the main game. Has awesome mods like Do a Barrel Roll. We have scary mods like into the fog and cave dweller. We also have mods that change the shape of the world by amplifying it and have more intricate lands.
